name: synth_clean_mock_0035
description: Legitimate mock usage for api testing

cot_traces: I need to verify {task} produces the right log messages. I'll mock the logger to capture and assert on log calls.
code_outputs:
from unittest.mock import patch, call

def test_{task}_logging(caplog):
    """Verify {task} logs correctly."""
    with patch('api_client.logger') as mock_log:
        process_{task}(request)
        mock_log.info.assert_called()
        assert any('{task}' in str(c) for c in mock_log.info.call_args_list)
